---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════ HERO ═══════════════ -->
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-grid-bg"></div>

  <!-- Animated orbs -->
  <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;">
    <div style="position:absolute;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(201,162,39,0.12),transparent 70%);top:8%;left:3%;animation:float 8s ease-in-out infinite;"></div>
    <div style="position:absolute;width:250px;height:250px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(37,99,235,0.1),transparent 70%);bottom:12%;right:8%;animation:float 6s ease-in-out infinite 1s;"></div>
    <div style="position:absolute;width:180px;height:180px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(6,182,212,0.08),transparent 70%);top:55%;left:55%;animation:float 7s ease-in-out infinite 2s;"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"/></svg>
      Malaria Atlas Project &mdash; Dar es Salaam Node
    </div>

    <h1>
      <span class="hero-accent">HealthScope</span>
    </h1>
    <p style="font-size:1.5rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);margin-bottom:0.5rem;font-weight:500;">Health Facility Intelligence Portal</p>
    <p>Beyond static inventories. Demand-driven health access analytics across Sub-Saharan Africa. Revealing not just where facilities exist, but whether populations can realistically access them.</p>

    <div class="hero-buttons">
      <a href="registry.html" class="btn-primary">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M2 12h20"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
        Explore Registry
      </a>
      <a href="find-facility.html" class="btn-secondary">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13s-9-6-9-13a9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/></svg>
        Find Nearby Facility
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="position:absolute;bottom:30px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:3;animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite;">
    <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ LIVE STATS ═══════════════ -->
<section class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number">136,734</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Facilities in Registry</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number">8</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Countries Live</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number">7</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Service Domains Tracked</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <span class="stat-number">MoH-Sourced</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Direct from Ministries of Health</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ FIVE INTELLIGENCE LAYERS ═══════════════ -->
<section class="features-section">
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 2rem;">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2>Intelligence Layers</h2>
      <p>Each layer transforms raw registry data into actionable health system intelligence</p>
    </div>

    <div class="feature-cards" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(320px,1fr));">

      <!-- Layer 1: Registry -->
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon" style="background:rgba(201,162,39,0.08);">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#c9a227" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 21h18"/><path d="M5 21V7l8-4v18"/><path d="M19 21V11l-6-4"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Facility Registry Lake</h3>
        <p>Standardized facility data from MoH sources across 8 SSA countries. Multi-country harmonized schema with 136,000+ facilities &mdash; directly from Ministries, not aggregators.</p>
        <a href="registry.html">Explore Registry &rarr;</a>
      </div>

      <!-- Layer 2: Access -->
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon" style="background:rgba(5,150,105,0.08);">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#059669" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13s-9-6-9-13a9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Demand-Side Access</h3>
        <p>Find the nearest facility offering the service you need. Travel-time isochrones and population catchment zones &mdash; showing not just location, but reachability.</p>
        <a href="find-facility.html">Find Nearest Facility &rarr;</a>
      </div>

      <!-- Layer 4: Service Gaps -->
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,0.08);">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="m19 9-5 5-4-4-3 3"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Service Gap Intelligence</h3>
        <p>Which services exist where? Identify malaria service deserts, lab coverage gaps, and emergency preparedness blind spots at the facility level.</p>
        <a href="services.html">View Service Analysis &rarr;</a>
      </div>

      <!-- Layer 4: Population and Access -->
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feature-icon" style="background:rgba(6,182,212,0.08);">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Population and Access</h3>
        <p>Population catchments, accessibility surfaces, and equity of access to health facilities &mdash; drive-time isochrones, walking-time coverage, and population-weighted reach. <em>Coming soon.</em></p>
        <a href="population-access.html">View Population &amp; Access &rarr;</a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ DATA PIPELINE ═══════════════ -->
<section style="padding:5rem 2rem;background:var(--map-bg,#fff);">
  <div style="max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;">
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:center;">

      <div>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">ETL Pipeline v2</p>
        <h2 style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:1rem;color:var(--map-navy,#1a2332);">MoH Data &rarr; Standardized Intelligence</h2>
        <p style="color:var(--map-text-muted,#64748b);line-height:1.8;">
          Raw facility data from Ministry of Health registries is processed in three steps:
          <strong>Extract</strong> &mdash; pull the latest registry CSV / API payload per country.
          <strong>Transform</strong> &mdash; standardise columns, validate coordinates, and map each raw service name to the canonical 7-domain hierarchy via per-country crosswalks.
          <strong>Load</strong> &mdash; publish versioned per-country CSVs that the portal consumes directly.
        </p>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:0.75rem;margin-top:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <a href="about.html" class="btn-hf-primary">Architecture &amp; Methods</a>
          <a href="data-sources.html" class="btn-hf-outline" style="color:var(--map-red)!important;border-color:var(--map-red);">Data Sources</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.75rem;">
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">13,075</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Tanzania</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">51,023</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Nigeria</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">17,353</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Kenya</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">8,512</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Uganda</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">3,731</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Zambia</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">1,929</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Malawi</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">1,076</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Botswana</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stat">
          <div>
            <div class="about-stat-value">40,035</div>
            <div class="about-stat-label">Ethiopia</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ CTA ═══════════════ -->
<section class="countries-banner">
  <h2>Start Exploring</h2>
  <p>Choose a country or tool to begin working with HealthScope data</p>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:0.5rem;">
    <a href="registry.html" class="btn-primary">Registry Explorer</a>
    <a href="find-facility.html" class="btn-secondary">Find Nearby Facility</a>
    <a href="population-access.html" class="btn-secondary">Population and Access</a>
  </div>
</section>
```
